title: clausena kanpurensis
intro: Clausena kanpurensis, also known as Kanpure or Kanpur tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to India and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clausena kanpurensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Clausena kanpurensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
